overview: A retro Pac-Man arcade game with pixel-perfect visuals, original ghost AI, multiple cycling mazes, sound effects, high-score persistence, and both keyboard and mobile controls.
features: Classic maze with neon blue walls and dot pellets
Four ghosts with original arcade targeting AI and scatter/chase modes
Power pellets that make ghosts vulnerable for bonus points
3-4 distinct cycling mazes with progressive difficulty
Sound effects: chomp, power pellet, ghost eat, death, and level intro
Keyboard arrow keys and WASD controls
Mobile touch and swipe controls with on-screen directional pad
Start, game over, and level transition screens with HUD
